name: Quotes page — pipeline track with stages
description: User opens /quotes and sees their pipeline laid out by stage: opened, sent, cooling, stale. Cards show client, summary, value, days in stage, and open count.

persona.name: Lena Park
persona.context: Wants to know which quotes need attention this week.

preconditions: Account has 8 quotes spread across all 4 stages
At least one quote with multiple opens (engaged)

steps.expect: Stage columns/track visible with counts; cards within sorted by daysIn within each stage
Subtle hover state; quick summary in tooltip or expanded card section
Opens quote detail with full line items, send/edit/lock controls and a public-link copy button
Stage scroll position restored; engaged cards (high opens) remain visually accented

evaluationCriteria.check: Stage colors are consistent with mood/heat ('opened' warm, 'stale' cool); not color-only signal
Track is scannable left-to-right or top-to-bottom — user knows in 3 seconds where to look
Open count and daysIn match backend values; no off-by-one rounding
Stages are headings or labelled regions; cards have the client name first in the accessible name
